description: Import IM1, IM2, and IM3 Practice Worksheet Student Bundles as reviewed Markdown problem set catalogs before mapping selected groups to React worked, guided, and independent practice components.
deviation_notes: Full regeneration of IM2 (96 lessons) and IM3 (52 lessons) from DOCX sources. Original authored files had source-content mismatches, wrong math delimiters, and missing template sections. Template compliance achieved across all 241 lesson files.
